name: Vision
description: A Hyperion repeater built around the manufacturer's reverse-recoil behavior, rewarding you for staying on the trigger until the aim steadies. Its matching Hyperion barrel sharpens accuracy, reduces recoil, and adds a critical-hit bonus, but usually trims the magazine and some base damage in exchange. It feels most at home in controlled precision fire at close to medium range.
notes: In The Pre-Sequel, the Vision often appears with Hyperion's newer material sets and a similar prefix style. A related variant there, the Factualizer, is produced by the older Hyperion line. It appears only at green rarity or higher and drops randomly from suitable loot sources.
